name: hekatomb
title: hekatomb

commands.name: hekatomb

arguments.description: show this help message and exit
arguments.raw: -h, --help            show this help message and exit

arguments.description: DNS server IP address to resolve computers hostname
arguments.raw: -dns DNS              DNS server IP address to resolve computers hostname

arguments.description: Port to connect to SMB Server
arguments.raw: -port [port]          Port to connect to SMB Server

arguments.description: Force the use of SMBv2 protocol
arguments.raw: -smb2                 Force the use of SMBv2 protocol

arguments.description: Print md5 hash instead of clear passwords
arguments.raw: -md5                  Print md5 hash instead of clear passwords

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# hekatomb -h

 ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą   ‚ĖÄ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĄ‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĄ   ‚Ėď  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí ‚Ėď‚Ėí‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚ĖÄ‚Ėą‚ĖÄ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĄ 
 ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖÄ‚ĖÄ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą   ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĄ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą  ‚ĖÄ‚Ėą‚ĖĄ ‚Ėí ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą    ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí ‚ĖĄ‚Ėą‚Ėą
 ‚ĖĎ‚Ėď‚Ėą ‚ĖĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą ‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą  ‚ĖĄ ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą ‚Ėą‚ĖĄ‚ĖĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĄ‚ĖĄ‚ĖĄ‚ĖĄ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėď ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą   ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą    ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖĎ‚Ėą‚ĖÄ  
 ‚ĖĎ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėď‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí ‚Ėą‚ĖĄ‚Ėď‚Ėą   ‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėď‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí   ‚ĖĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėď‚Ėą  ‚ĖÄ‚Ėą‚Ėď
‚Ėí ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí ‚Ėí‚Ėí ‚Ėď‚Ėí‚Ėí‚Ėí   ‚Ėď‚Ėí‚Ėą‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚Ėď‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ĖÄ‚Ėí
‚Ėí ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí   ‚Ėí‚Ėí ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ‚Ėí‚ĖĎ‚Ėí   ‚ĖĎ 
‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ   ‚Ėí    ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí  ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ 
‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ        ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ            ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ         ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ      
  Because Domain Admin rights are not enough.
 		Hack them all.
 
 	         @Processus
 	            v1.5
 **************************************************
 
 
 usage: hekatomb [-h] [-hashes LMHASH:NTHASH] [-pvk PVK] [-dns DNS]
               [-port [port]] [-smb2] [-just-user JUST_USER]
               [-just-computer JUST_COMPUTER] [-md5] [-csv] [-debug]
               [-debugmax]
               target
 
 Script used to automate domain computers and users extraction from LDAP and
 extraction of domain controller private key through RPC to collect and decrypt
 all users' DPAPI secrets saved in Windows credential manager.
 
 positional arguments:
 target                [[domain/]username[:password]@]<targetName or address
                       of DC>
 
 options:
 -h, --help            show this help message and exit
 
 authentication:
 -hashes LMHASH:NTHASH
                       NTLM hashes, format is LMHASH:NTHASH
 
 authentication:
 -pvk PVK              Domain backup keys file
 -dns DNS              DNS server IP address to resolve computers hostname
 -port [port]          Port to connect to SMB Server
 -smb2                 Force the use of SMBv2 protocol
 -just-user JUST_USER  Test only specified username
 -just-computer JUST_COMPUTER
                       Test only specified computer
 -md5                  Print md5 hash instead of clear passwords
 
 verbosity:
 -csv                  Export results to CSV file
 -debug                Turn DEBUG output ON
 -debugmax             Turn DEBUG output TO MAAAAXXXX

 ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ   ‚Ėí    ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ ‚Ėí  ‚ĖĎ      ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ 
 ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ   ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ        ‚ĖĎ  ‚ĖĎ            ‚ĖĎ ‚ĖĎ         ‚ĖĎ    ‚ĖĎ      
   Because Domain Admin rights are not enough.
		Hack them all.

	         @Processus
	            v1.5
**************************************************


usage: hekatomb [-h] [-hashes LMHASH:NTHASH] [-pvk PVK] [-dns DNS]
                [-port [port]] [-smb2] [-just-user JUST_USER]
                [-just-computer JUST_COMPUTER] [-md5] [-csv] [-debug]
                [-debugmax]
                target

Script used to automate domain computers and users extraction from LDAP and
extraction of domain controller private key through RPC to collect and decrypt
all users' DPAPI secrets saved in Windows credential manager.

positional arguments:
  target                [[domain/]username[:password]@]<targetName or address
                        of DC>

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

authentication:
  -hashes LMHASH:NTHASH
                        NTLM hashes, format is LMHASH:NTHASH

authentication:
  -pvk PVK              Domain backup keys file
  -dns DNS              DNS server IP address to resolve computers hostname
  -port [port]          Port to connect to SMB Server
  -smb2                 Force the use of SMBv2 protocol
  -just-user JUST_USER  Test only specified username
  -just-computer JUST_COMPUTER
                        Test only specified computer
  -md5                  Print md5 hash instead of clear passwords

verbosity:
  -csv                  Export results to CSV file
  -debug                Turn DEBUG output ON
  -debugmax             Turn DEBUG output TO MAAAAXXXX

apt_metadata.depends: python3-chardet (>= 5.2.0), python3-dnspython (>= 2.2.1), python3-impacket, python3-ldap3 (>= 2.9), python3-pycryptodome (>= 3.11), python3:any
apt_metadata.description:
Extract and decrypt all credentials from all domain computers
Hekatomb is a Python script that connects to an LDAP directory to retrieve all
computers and users' information. From there, it will download all DPAPI blobs
of all users from all computers and use Domain backup keys to decrypt them.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only ‚ÄĒ no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
